# Aira — 20 Magical Action Reels · Heavy-Detail Build (7–8 Frames · Fight · Vehicle · Stunt)

<aside>
⚔️

Aira — 20 Magical Action Reels. A fully new lane: bone-deep choreography, real vehicle damage, vivid colour, dynamic adrenaline expressions, and one impossible magical move per concept. Built on Sys Directive 3 + Vibrance Patch. Stills on Nano Banana Pro, motion on VEO 3.1, 9:16 vertical, identity-locked Aira (adult, 25, carried entirely by the reference sheet — no physical or ethnic enumeration). Every concept runs 7–8 frames and ships two complete audio layers: an in-frame diegetic block inside each Video Prompt, and a separate Master Soundtrack & Sound-Design Brief outside the prompts. Combat and stunts are stylized and non-gory; damage lands on vehicles and environment, never bodies.
STRICT COLOUR & RENDER MANDATE (must be followed exactly; this governs render QUALITY only and must NOT change the composition, camera, lens, framing, wardrobe, action or identity specified above): render the colours already specified at their richest, freshest, cleanest and most premium — crisp, vivid and luminous with elegant, controlled saturation; never dull, faded, washed-out, muddy, grey or flat. Hold deep-but-clean blacks, luminous full mid-tones and beautiful highlight roll-off with high dynamic range and no blown highlights. Wherever sky is visible, render it richly graded and cinematic — never empty, white or overexposed. Wherever water is visible, render it crystal-clear with deep sea-blue and turquoise gradients, clean caustics and sparkling reflections — never grey or murky (unless the concept explicitly specifies dark / ink / obsidian water, which stays deep, glassy and clean). Protect natural, true skin tone; never push saturation onto the face. Keep the image immaculately clean and premium with clear figure-to-ground separation so the hero reads first; honour the concept's intended dominant surface and full-frame coverage, and do NOT reveal unwanted structural edges, seams, side-walls or empty dead space that break the intended composition. Photoreal, award-winning editorial finish — no AI artifacts, plastic or waxy skin, dead eyes, malformed hands or unfinished backgrounds.

</aside>

<aside>
🧭

How to read each concept — A Concept Header (locked creative bible) → a 🎚️ Master Soundtrack block (Audio Block B) → then each frame as an IMAGE PROMPT (Nano Banana Pro still; includes Eye Colour · Footwear · Accessories and an exact Expression read) followed by a VIDEO PROMPT (VEO 3.1 motion; includes Physics and timecoded subject + object action, plus the expression's transition across the beat). Frame 1 is the only fresh keyframe; every later frame seeds from the previous frame's final image for perfect continuity.
STRICT COLOUR & RENDER MANDATE (must be followed exactly; this governs render QUALITY only and must NOT change the composition, camera, lens, framing, wardrobe, action or identity specified above): render the colours already specified at their richest, freshest, cleanest and most premium — crisp, vivid and luminous with elegant, controlled saturation; never dull, faded, washed-out, muddy, grey or flat. Hold deep-but-clean blacks, luminous full mid-tones and beautiful highlight roll-off with high dynamic range and no blown highlights. Wherever sky is visible, render it richly graded and cinematic — never empty, white or overexposed. Wherever water is visible, render it crystal-clear with deep sea-blue and turquoise gradients, clean caustics and sparkling reflections — never grey or murky (unless the concept explicitly specifies dark / ink / obsidian water, which stays deep, glassy and clean). Protect natural, true skin tone; never push saturation onto the face. Keep the image immaculately clean and premium with clear figure-to-ground separation so the hero reads first; honour the concept's intended dominant surface and full-frame coverage, and do NOT reveal unwanted structural edges, seams, side-walls or empty dead space that break the intended composition. Photoreal, award-winning editorial finish — no AI artifacts, plastic or waxy skin, dead eyes, malformed hands or unfinished backgrounds.

</aside>

- 🎭 Expression Engine (AX) — the adrenaline face + body system woven into every frame
 
 Each frame names an exact emotional state; the Video Prompt scripts the transition between states across the beat. Use micro-tells freely: flared nostrils, neck tendons, sweat sheen, coiled shoulders, trembling fists, sharp head turns, chest heave, forward-lean commitment.
STRICT COLOUR & RENDER MANDATE (must be followed exactly; this governs render QUALITY only and must NOT change the composition, camera, lens, framing, wardrobe, action or identity specified above): render the colours already specified at their richest, freshest, cleanest and most premium — crisp, vivid and luminous with elegant, controlled saturation; never dull, faded, washed-out, muddy, grey or flat. Hold deep-but-clean blacks, luminous full mid-tones and beautiful highlight roll-off with high dynamic range and no blown highlights. Wherever sky is visible, render it richly graded and cinematic — never empty, white or overexposed. Wherever water is visible, render it crystal-clear with deep sea-blue and turquoise gradients, clean caustics and sparkling reflections — never grey or murky (unless the concept explicitly specifies dark / ink / obsidian water, which stays deep, glassy and clean). Protect natural, true skin tone; never push saturation onto the face. Keep the image immaculately clean and premium with clear figure-to-ground separation so the hero reads first; honour the concept's intended dominant surface and full-frame coverage, and do NOT reveal unwanted structural edges, seams, side-walls or empty dead space that break the intended composition. Photoreal, award-winning editorial finish — no AI artifacts, plastic or waxy skin, dead eyes, malformed hands or unfinished backgrounds.
 
 — Cold Focus / game face: calm intensity, steady level gaze, controlled breath, lips in a strong neutral set.
 
 — Determination: narrowed "focus eyes," clenched jaw, brow knit, locked on target.
 
 — Alert / Shock: wide dilated eyes, raised brows, whites showing, sharp head turn, quick scan.
 
 — Grit / Effort: bared teeth, gritted strain, flared nostrils, neck tendons standing out.
 
 — Rage: snarl, bared teeth, deep furrow, full forward drive.
 
 — Pain / Brace: grimace, eyes squeezed, asymmetric brow, recoil wince.
 
 — Panic-Control: darting eyes, gasp, frantic micro-corrections held under control.
 
 — Thrill / Defiance: adrenaline grin, bright wide eyes, reckless spark.
 
 — Awe: parted lips, lifted brows, eyes catching the magic light.
 
 — Exhaustion: slack mouth, heavy lids, heaving chest.
 
 — Triumph / Relief: easing tension, long exhale, brief fierce smile.

| 07 | Frozen-Lake Snowcat Demolition | Snow vehicle | Armored snowcats | Ice fractures bloom into glowing fractal patterns | 7 | Heavy, crystalline |
| 08 | Coastal Jet-Ski Cliff Run | Water vehicle | Jet-skis | Spray suspends into liquid-glass ribbons | 8 | Bright, salt-spray |
| 09 | Speedboat Deck Fight | Water + unarmed | Boats + flying kicks | A wave rises into a translucent water-wall | 7 | Tense, aquatic |
| 10 | Waterfall Kayak Plunge Duel | Water vehicle | Whitewater kayaks | Falling water freezes into a crystal staircase | 8 | Roaring, sublime |

| 17 | Horseback vs Motorcycle Plains Chase | Hybrid chase | Horse + dirt bike | The dust-cloud forms a running phoenix | 7 | Golden, thunderous |
| 18 | Megacity Parkour Foot-Chase | Foot chase + unarmed | Free-running strikes | Shattered glass freezes into a mirror-corridor | 7 | Slick, urgent |
| 19 | Wingsuit Canyon Sky-Chase | Air stunt | Wingsuit | Glowing cloud-trails bloom into light | 8 | Soaring, weightless |
| 20 | Phoenix Convoy Finale | Grand finale | Convoy + unarmed | Wreck-sparks rise and reform into a phoenix | 8 | Apocalyptic, victorious |

## Concept 01 — Roofless Hypercar Desert Run

Lane: Car chase · open-top hypercar.

Format: Eight-frame vertical action reel — one continuous golden-hour run rendered as eight seeded keyframes, roughly twenty-four seconds.

Hero Vehicle: A low, wide open-top hypercar in molten-orange pearl over a matte-carbon floor, single dorsal fin, exposed aero and mechanical detail, and progressive realistic damage that accumulates frame to frame — stone-chipped nose, scuffed flank, one hairline-cracked aero blade — never wrecked, always drivable.

Setting: A dead-straight salt-and-sand highway carving through towering ochre dunes at golden hour, heat-haze boiling off the tarmac, a far mesa skyline, telephone poles ticking past. Each area of the frame intentionally composed, pristine and luxurious, with true foreground-to-background layering and immersive environmental depth.

Wardrobe: A fitted matte-charcoal technical driving suit with burnt-orange piping, high collar, articulated shoulder panels, reinforced knees — full-coverage, modest, motorsport-coded.

Footwear: Low-profile carbon-soled racing boots in charcoal with orange laced detail, ankle-snug, built for pedal feel.

Eye Colour: Warm amber-brown, catching the gold light with a bright specular ring, fixed on the vanishing point.

Accessories: Fingerless carbon driving gloves, a slim matte-black helmet (held in static frames, worn from Frame 3), reflective amber-tint goggles, a thin titanium wrist cuff.

Hair: A tight low braid that whips as a single mass in the slipstream, edges sealed, no loose chaos.

Makeup: Matte sun-warmed complexion, defined brow, bronze-amber eye, true-neutral lip; sweat-sheen allowed, no smear.

Movement (the one impossible move): As the car punches through its own slipstream, the sand it throws does not fall — it freezes into suspended ribbons of liquid gold that hang in the air and trail the car like calligraphy, then sublimate into sparks.

Concept Line: "She doesn't outrun the desert — she rewrites it in gold."

Duration: ~24 seconds · 8 frames · 24fps · 180° shutter.

Mood: Molten, triumphant, vast, cinematic.

Composition: Wide anamorphic-feel verticals, low horizon, strong road leading-lines, car raked across thirds; hero close-ups intercut with God's-eye and chase plates. Premium foreground, midground and background layering with strong three-dimensional depth and clean visual balance (original framing preserved).

Grade: Burnished gold-orange highlights, deep teal dune-shadow, high micro-contrast, gentle sun halation, clean blacks. World-class editorial colour — rich and vivid yet clean, luminous mid-tones, deep-but-clean blacks, controlled saturation, nothing washed-out, natural skin protected.

Identity Safety: Aira rendered entirely from the locked reference sheet; adult, 25; no physical or ethnic enumeration; full-coverage wardrobe; stylized stunt, damage on vehicle and road only.

### 🎚️ Master Soundtrack & Sound-Design Brief — Audio Block B (outside the prompts)

Role: The continuous score and sound-design bed running under the in-frame diegetic audio across all eight frames, binding them into one twenty-four-second piece. Genre & palette: Cinematic desert-electronic — orchestral low brass, a darbuka hand-drum pulse, analog synth bass, and a soaring duduk-style lead reserved for the magic. Tempo & key: 124 BPM, D minor, 4/4, locked so impacts land on the downbeat. Instrumentation by layer: sub-bass sine plus distorted synth bass (engine power), low strings and brass swell (scale), darbuka and taiko (forward drive), shimmering bell and duduk pad (the gold-ribbon magic), a granular sand-texture synth (atmosphere). Dynamic arc: Frames 1–2 sparse and tense (pulse and sub only); Frames 3–5 full drive enters with the chase; Frame 6 the magic swell blooms as duduk and bells lift over a riser; Frame 7 a half-time breakdown for the near-miss; Frame 8 full triumphant tutti, then a clean tail resolving to the opening pulse for a perfect loop. Hits & transitions: sub-drop on the launch (F2 into F3), a reverse-cymbal riser into the gold-ribbon reveal (F6), an impact boom and 200ms near-silence on the near-miss (F7), a brass-and-taiko stinger on the hero stop (F8). Mix: score sits about 6 dB under diegetic engine and impacts; sidechain the bed to the biggest roars; wide-stereo pads, mono-tight sub; light tape saturation and desert-air reverb on the lead. Loop point: the final bar's pulse matches bar one.

MASTER AUDIO: a 48-second custom cinematic score (8 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on deep trailer percussion, a driving synth bass and brass swells — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a low brass-and-sub impact (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 5, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — As the car punches through its own slipstream, the sand it throws does not fall, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, taut percussive tension as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

### Frame 1 of 8 — IMAGE PROMPT
STRICT COLOUR & RENDER MANDATE (must be followed exactly; this governs render QUALITY only and must NOT change the composition, camera, lens, framing, wardrobe, action or identity specified above): render the colours already specified at their richest, freshest, cleanest and most premium — crisp, vivid and luminous with elegant, controlled saturation; never dull, faded, washed-out, muddy, grey or flat. Hold deep-but-clean blacks, luminous full mid-tones and beautiful highlight roll-off with high dynamic range and no blown highlights. Wherever sky is visible, render it richly graded and cinematic — never empty, white or overexposed. Wherever water is visible, render it crystal-clear with deep sea-blue and turquoise gradients, clean caustics and sparkling reflections — never grey or murky (unless the concept explicitly specifies dark / ink / obsidian water, which stays deep, glassy and clean). Protect natural, true skin tone; never push saturation onto the face. Keep the image immaculately clean and premium with clear figure-to-ground separation so the hero reads first; honour the concept's intended dominant surface and full-frame coverage, and do NOT reveal unwanted structural edges, seams, side-walls or empty dead space that break the intended composition. Photoreal, award-winning editorial finish — no AI artifacts, plastic or waxy skin, dead eyes, malformed hands or unfinished backgrounds.

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here]. Scene: she stands beside the parked hypercar at the dune's edge in low golden light, one gloved hand on the door sill, head turned to read the empty highway ahead. WARDROBE: the matte-charcoal driving suit with burnt-orange piping, collar up, zipped to the sternum, pristine in this opening frame. FOOTWEAR: charcoal carbon-soled racing boots with orange laces, planted shoulder-width, one heel just lifted. EYE COLOUR: warm amber-brown, bright catchlight, gaze down the road. ACCESSORIES: fingerless carbon gloves, reflective amber goggles pushed onto the brow, helmet resting on the car roof, thin titanium wrist cuff. HAIR: tight low braid, sealed edges, faint wind lift at the tail. MAKEUP: matte sun-warmed skin, defined brow, bronze-amber eye, neutral lip. HANDS & NAILS: short clean nails, gloved fingers relaxed on the sill. EXPRESSION: cold-focus game face — steady level gaze fixed on the vanishing point, lips in a strong neutral set, a slow controlled exhale, the faintest anticipatory tension at the jaw; calm intensity, not a smile. BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: weight on the back foot, hips squared to the car, shoulders settled, living stillness — breath and braid alive, frame composed. SPATIAL LOGIC: foreground dune grass and the front wheel; midground Aira and the open door; background the highway shrinking into heat-haze and a mesa. LIGHTING: KEY low golden sun from camera-left raking the face; FILL warm sand-bounce; RIM bright sun-edge on braid and shoulder; SEPARATION haze glow behind her. FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16, medium-wide, low camera, horizon on the lower third, figure and car across the right two-thirds. SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: Framed as medium-wide, low camera, horizon on the lower third, figure and car across the right two-thirds, on a low hero angle looking up. Most of the figure is in frame with the environment around her. Her body is hips squared and weight grounded, in dynamically angled to camera. Camera distance follows the shot size, holding the action sharp. The beat: she stands beside the parked hypercar at the dune's edge in low golden light, one gloved hand on the door sill, head turned to read the empty highway ahead. Her pose reads as weight on the back foot, hips squared to the car, shoulders settled, living stillness — breath and braid alive, frame composed — gaze level and reading the scene with cold focus; head steady, turned to the action; both shoulders settled and squared, alive with breath; the RIGHT arm poised and ready with the hand relaxed but set; the LEFT arm easy and counter-balanced at her side; torso upright and composed in living stillness; waist long with the hips squared, weight carried on the back foot; the RIGHT leg bearing the load with a soft knee while the LEFT braces with one heel just lifted; both feet planted and grounded, weight back and ready to spring; hair alive in the wind, sealed and controlled. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame. LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm-equivalent, f/4, deep enough to hold the road, soft heat-shimmer bokeh on the mesa. ATMOSPHERE: drifting sand veils, heat-haze, suspended dust motes in the sun. COLOR GRADE: burnished gold highlights, teal dune-shadow, high micro-contrast, gentle sun halation. TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: real pores and fabric weave, fine sand on the boots, flake-free paint, road grit. NEGATIVE: no extra people, no facial blur, no distorted hands, no logos or text, no melted car geometry, no oversaturation, no sexualization, no physical or ethnic enumeration, no watermark.

### Frame 1 of 8 — VIDEO PROMPT
STRICT COLOUR & RENDER MANDATE (must be followed exactly; this governs render QUALITY only and must NOT change the composition, camera, lens, framing, wardrobe, action or identity specified above): render the colours already specified at their richest, freshest, cleanest and most premium — crisp, vivid and luminous with elegant, controlled saturation; never dull, faded, washed-out, muddy, grey or flat. Hold deep-but-clean blacks, luminous full mid-tones and beautiful highlight roll-off with high dynamic range and no blown highlights. Wherever sky is visible, render it richly graded and cinematic — never empty, white or overexposed. Wherever water is visible, render it crystal-clear with deep sea-blue and turquoise gradients, clean caustics and sparkling reflections — never grey or murky (unless the concept explicitly specifies dark / ink / obsidian water, which stays deep, glassy and clean). Protect natural, true skin tone; never push saturation onto the face. Keep the image immaculately clean and premium with clear figure-to-ground separation so the hero reads first; honour the concept's intended dominant surface and full-frame coverage, and do NOT reveal unwanted structural edges, seams, side-walls or empty dead space that break the intended composition. Photoreal, award-winning editorial finish — no AI artifacts, plastic or waxy skin, dead eyes, malformed hands or unfinished backgrounds.

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: Medium-wide hero establishing shot, low angle. CAMERA MOVEMENT: one move only — a slow 1.2x push-in toward Aira as she reads the road. LENS: 35mm-equivalent, f/4. PHYSICS: the car sits static with realistic suspension load and tire flex on the warm tarmac; heat-haze refracts the background with rising convection; the braid tail and a few sand grains drift on a light crosswind with believable mass; no contact forces yet. SUBJECT + OBJECT ACTION (timecoded): 0.0–2.0s Aira finishes a slow exhale, gloved fingers settling on the door sill, head still toward the road (car motionless); 2.0–4.0s she lifts the goggles fractionally and her gaze hardens, weight shifting onto the back foot; 4.0–6.0s she reaches for the helmet on the roof, the only object motion a slight rock of the car on its springs as her hand presses the sill. EXPRESSION TRANSITION: throughout — from a settled neutral set into a microscopic narrowing of the eyes by 5.0s as resolve gathers; no smile. LIGHTING: golden key, warm bounce, haze separation, slow flicker of heat-shimmer. ENVIRONMENT: empty desert highway, ticking telephone poles, distant mesa. AUDIO (Block A, in-frame diegetic): a soft desert wind bed, fine sand hiss, the tick of cooling metal, one distant bird, a single gloved-leather creak on the sill at 4.0s; no engine yet — score pulse only underneath. DURATION: 6.0s. FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, 180° shutter, natural motion blur on the braid and haze. LIP-SYNC: none, lips set. NEGATIVE: no cuts, no second camera move, no engine sound yet, no people in background, no warping, no text or watermark.

### Frame 2 of 8 — IMAGE PROMPT
STRICT COLOUR & RENDER MANDATE (must be followed exactly; this governs render QUALITY only and must NOT change the composition, camera, lens, framing, wardrobe, action or identity specified above): render the colours already specified at their richest, freshest, cleanest and most premium — crisp, vivid and luminous with elegant, controlled saturation; never dull, faded, washed-out, muddy, grey or flat. Hold deep-but-clean blacks, luminous full mid-tones and beautiful highlight roll-off with high dynamic range and no blown highlights. Wherever sky is visible, render it richly graded and cinematic — never empty, white or overexposed. Wherever water is visible, render it crystal-clear with deep sea-blue and turquoise gradients, clean caustics and sparkling reflections — never grey or murky (unless the concept explicitly specifies dark / ink / obsidian water, which stays deep, glassy and clean). Protect natural, true skin tone; never push saturation onto the face. Keep the image immaculately clean and premium with clear figure-to-ground separation so the hero reads first; honour the concept's intended dominant surface and full-frame coverage, and do NOT reveal unwanted structural edges, seams, side-walls or empty dead space that break the intended composition. Photoreal, award-winning editorial finish — no AI artifacts, plastic or waxy skin, dead eyes, malformed hands or unfinished backgrounds.

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here], continuity from Frame 1. Scene: seated low in the cockpit at the moment of launch, both gloved hands gripping the wheel, the dune wall sliding behind as the car breaks away. WARDROBE: driving suit now belted, collar up; first faint dust film appears on the shoulders. FOOTWEAR: right boot buried on the throttle, ankle flexed, left braced on the floor. EYE COLOUR: amber-brown, pupils tightening, fixed dead ahead. ACCESSORIES: gloves locked on the wheel, goggles down over the eyes now, helmet on, titanium cuff just visible at the wrist. HAIR: braid snapping straight back as speed builds. MAKEUP: matte, first sweat-sheen at the temple. HANDS & NAILS: white-knuckle grip, tendons raised across the gloves. EXPRESSION: determination — narrowed focus-eyes, clenched jaw, brow knit hard, nostrils just flaring on the launch breath, lips pressed flat. BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: pinned back into the seat by acceleration, chin level, shoulders coiled forward over the wheel. SPATIAL LOGIC: foreground wheel rim and knuckles; midground Aira's torso and the cockpit; background the dune wall streaking into motion blur. LIGHTING: KEY gold sun across the visor and cheek; FILL orange cockpit bounce; RIM hot edge on the helmet; PRACTICAL faint dash glow. FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16, tight medium from the hood line, slight Dutch for energy. SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: Framed as tight medium from the hood line, slight Dutch for energy, on a canted Dutch angle. The upper body fills the frame, chest-to-head. Her body is alive and committed to the motion, in dynamically angled to camera. Camera distance follows the shot size, holding the action sharp. The beat: seated low in the cockpit at the moment of launch, both gloved hands gripping the wheel, the dune wall sliding behind as the car breaks away. Her pose reads as pinned back into the seat by acceleration, chin level, shoulders coiled forward over the wheel — gaze fixed dead ahead, pupils tight on the vanishing point; head held level and steady through the lurch; both shoulders driving forward then pinned; the RIGHT hand clamping the wheel or grip while the LEFT hand locks beside it, tendons raised; torso thrown back into the seat by explosive acceleration, core locked; waist braced, hips pinned; the RIGHT leg stamping the throttle while the LEFT braces on the floor; both feet committed, weight slamming rearward; braid whipping straight back as speed builds. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame. LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 50mm-equivalent, f/2.8, sharp on the eyes, background dissolving to speed-streak bokeh. ATMOSPHERE: first kicked dust at the rear, lens vibration. COLOR GRADE: molten golds, deep cockpit teal, punchy contrast. TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: pores, glove stitching, micro-dust on the dash, paint stone-chip beginning on the nose. NEGATIVE: no extra limbs, no warped wheel, no facial blur, no logos, no oversaturation, no sexualization, no enumeration, no text.

### Frame 2 of 8 — VIDEO PROMPT
STRICT COLOUR & RENDER MANDATE (must be followed exactly; this governs render QUALITY only and must NOT change the composition, camera, lens, framing, wardrobe, action or identity specified above): render the colours already specified at their richest, freshest, cleanest and most premium — crisp, vivid and luminous with elegant, controlled saturation; never dull, faded, washed-out, muddy, grey or flat. Protect natural, true skin tone; never push saturation onto the face. EXPRESSION (into ): awe breaking into defiant thrill — lips parting, brows lifting at the gold ribbons, then a wild adrenaline half-grin, eyes bright and reckless. BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: weight rebalancing out of the slide, chest lifting, shoulders opening with exhilaration. SPATIAL LOGIC: foreground frozen gold sand-ribbons curling toward camera; midground the car emerging through them; background the dune corridor glowing. LIGHTING: KEY warm sun plus the self-luminous gold ribbons casting light back onto her face; RIM gold edge everywhere; FILL ambient glow. FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16, hero three-quarter, ribbons leading the eye to the cockpit. SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: Framed as hero three-quarter, ribbons leading the eye to the cockpit, on a dynamic action angle. The upper body fills the frame, chest-to-head. Her body is alive and committed to the motion, in a three-quarter view to camera. Camera distance follows the shot size, holding the action sharp. The beat: the magic blooms — the thrown sand does not fall. Her pose reads as weight rebalancing out of the slide, chest lifting, shoulders opening with exhilaration — gaze fierce and narrowed through the slide, reading the exit; head braced and steady against the lateral G; both shoulders driving the counter-steer; the RIGHT arm cranking full opposite-lock with forearm cords standing out while the LEFT arm braces the wheel; torso thrown against the lateral G, braced and coiled; waist torqued, hips wedged into the seat; the RIGHT leg feeding throttle mid-slide while the LEFT boot stays hard on the floor; both feet committed, weight slung outward against the slide; braid flung across the shoulder by the lateral throw. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame. LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 85mm-equivalent, f/2.8, ribbons rendered in luminous bokeh, sharp on her face. ATMOSPHERE: suspended liquid-gold filaments, drifting sparks where ribbons sublimate. COLOR GRADE: maximal molten gold, deep teal shadow for contrast, gentle bloom on the ribbons. TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: skin, fine grain in the gold filaments, glints along each ribbon, dust on the suit catching light. NEGATIVE: no extra people, no warped face, no garish neon, no logos, no oversaturation beyond the intended bloom, no sexualization, no enumeration, no text.

---

## Concept 02 — Neon Rooftop Motorcycle Chase

Lane: Bike chase · superbike.

Format: Seven-frame vertical action reel — one continuous night chase across rain-slick megacity rooftops rendered as seven seeded keyframes, roughly twenty-one seconds.

Hero Vehicle: A matte-black superbike with electric-cyan accent lines, glowing rim strips, exposed trellis frame and forks; progressive realistic damage — scuffed fairing, a scraped peg, road-rash on the tank — never broken, always rideable.

Setting: A vertiginous megacity skyline at night, connected rooftops slick with rain, towering holographic billboards in magenta and cyan, steam venting from ducts, the street a glowing canyon far below. Every zone of the frame intentionally designed, immaculately clean and premium, with layered foreground, midground and background depth and rich environmental storytelling. Water rendered crystal-clear in rich sea-blue and turquoise gradients, with beautiful caustics and clean sparkling reflections.

Wardrobe: A fitted armored moto suit in matte charcoal with cyan seam-piping and subtle reflective panels, CE-armor shoulders and elbows, high collar — full-coverage, modest, track-coded.

Footwear: Armored riding boots in black with cyan heel detail, reinforced ankle and toe, slip-grip soles.

Eye Colour: Warm amber-brown (consistent locked identity), now flashing with reflected neon, fixed ahead.

Accessories: A matte-black full-face helmet with a mirrored cyan visor (worn from Frame 2), armored knuckle gloves, a slim chest-rig, the thin titanium wrist cuff.

Hair: The same tight low braid, tucked into the collar, tail flicking free in the slipstream.

Makeup: Matte complexion catching neon, defined brow, cool-toned eye, neutral lip; rain-sheen permitted.

Movement (the one impossible move): As the bike leaps a rooftop chasm, the neon glow of the city peels off the billboards and wraps the bike in ribbons of living light that freeze mid-air into a luminous cocoon, then trail away as sparks on landing.

Concept Line: "The city's light bends around her — and lets her fly."

Duration: ~21 seconds · 7 frames · 24fps · 180° shutter.

Mood: Electric, nocturnal, sleek, defiant.

Composition: Steep verticals, neon leading-lines, reflective rain foreground, the bike raked across thirds; intercut low chase plates, a vertical drop-angle over the chasm, and a hero skid. Premium foreground, midground and background layering with strong three-dimensional depth and clean visual balance (original framing preserved).

Grade: Deep teal-black night, electric cyan and magenta neon, wet specular highlights, rich blacks, controlled bloom on light sources. Premium editorial grade — rich clean colour, luminous mid-tones, deep-but-clean blacks, controlled elegant saturation, no faded or muddy tones, natural true skin preserved.

Identity Safety: Aira rendered entirely from the locked reference sheet; adult, 25; no physical or ethnic enumeration; full-coverage armored wardrobe; stylized stunt, damage on the bike and environment only.

### 🎚️ Master Soundtrack & Sound-Design Brief — Audio Block B (outside the prompts)

Role: The continuous score and sound-design bed under the in-frame diegetic audio across all seven frames, binding them into one twenty-one-second piece. Genre & palette: Darksynth / cyber-noir — arpeggiated analog synth, gated reverb drums, distorted reese bass, a neon-bright lead synth reserved for the magic, and rain-and-city ambience. Tempo & key: 140 BPM, F minor, 4/4, locked so jumps and impacts hit on the downbeat. Instrumentation by layer: pulsing sub and reese bass (bike power), 16th-note arpeggio (forward momentum), gated snare and toms (drive), shimmering supersaw lead and glassy bells (the neon-cocoon magic), granular rain-and-steam texture (atmosphere). Dynamic arc: Frame 1 sparse and tense (arp and rain only); Frames 2–3 full kit and bass enter with the launch and chase; Frame 4 a riser builds toward the chasm; Frame 5 a held breath-drop on the leap; Frame 6 the neon-magic lead blooms in full shimmer; Frame 7 a triumphant final hit that tails back to the opening arp for a perfect loop. Hits & transitions: sub-drop on the launch wheelie (F2), a rising synth riser into the jump (F4→F5), a beat-dropout and 250ms suspended silence at the apex (F5→F6), a gated-snare crash on the landing (F7). Mix: score about 6 dB under engine and impacts; sidechain the bed to the exhaust barks; wide-stereo arps and pads, mono-tight sub; tape-warm saturation, plate reverb on the lead, city-canyon delay throws. Loop point: the closing arp matches bar one.

MASTER AUDIO: a 42-second custom cinematic score (7 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on deep trailer percussion, a driving synth bass and brass swells — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a low brass-and-sub impact (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 5, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — As the bike leaps a rooftop chasm, the neon glow of the city peels off the…, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, taut percussive tension as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

### Frame 1 of 7 — IMAGE PROMPT

Wherever water is visible, render it crystal-clear with deep sea-blue and turquoise gradients, clean caustics and sparkling reflections — never grey or murky (unless the concept explicitly specifies dark / ink / obsidian water, which stays deep, glassy and clean). Protect natural, true skin tone; never push saturation onto the face. Keep the image immaculately clean and premium with clear figure-to-ground separation so the hero reads first; honour the concept's intended dominant surface and full-frame coverage, and do NOT reveal unwanted structural edges, seams, side-walls or empty dead space that break the intended composition. Photoreal, award-winning editorial finish — no AI artifacts, plastic or waxy skin, dead eyes, malformed hands or unfinished backgrounds.

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: Low front three-quarter approach shot. CAMERA MOVEMENT: one move only — a fast push toward the edge with the bike. LENS: 35mm-equivalent, f/4. PHYSICS: the bike accelerates at the makeshift ramp; suspension preloads as the front meets the rise; an updraft from the canyon buffets the body; the drop reveals true scale with parallax; rain streaks horizontally. SUBJECT + OBJECT ACTION (timecoded): 0.0–1.2s the rooftop edge and chasm rush into view, the bike charging the AC-unit ramp (drop yawning, mist rising); 1.2–2.8s Aira reads the gap and pins the throttle, weight loading as the front hits the ramp; 2.8–6.0s the suspension compresses to its limit, the bike rocketing up the ramp toward the lip. EXPRESSION TRANSITION: into — the locked stare blows wide at 1.2s, a caught breath, then compressing toward commitment by 5.0s. LIGHTING: uplight from the street, neon billboards, cool drop-shadow. ENVIRONMENT: rooftop edge, AC-unit ramp, glowing chasm. AUDIO (Block A): RPM screaming higher, a hollow boom as tires hit the ramp at 2.8s, updraft wind-howl, a caught breath at 1.4s; score riser builds. DURATION: 6.0s. FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, 180°, fast forward blur. LIP-SYNC: none; a sharp inhale. NEGATIVE: no fall, no cut, no warped ramp, no text, no other riders.

---

## Concept 03 — Rain-Garage Drift Duel

Lane: Drift · tandem duel, two drift cars.

Format: Seven-frame vertical action reel — one continuous tandem drift battle through a flooded multi-level garage rendered as seven seeded keyframes, roughly twenty-one seconds.

Hero Vehicle: A widebody drift coupe in pearl-white over matte-graphite, magenta accent stripes, exposed roll-cage, oversized rear wing, staggered wheels wreathed in tire smoke; progressive realistic damage — scraped front lip, rubbed door, a cracked corner light — never wrecked, always sliding.

Rival Vehicle: A blacked-out drift sedan with amber underglow, chasing door-to-door; takes its own scuffs and never crashes.

Setting: An abandoned multi-level parking structure at night, rain sheeting through open sides, glassy wet concrete, flickering fluorescent tubes, graffiti pillars, oil rainbows on the floor, the city glowing beyond the open edges. Each area of the frame intentionally composed, pristine and luxurious, with true foreground-to-background layering and immersive environmental depth. Water rendered crystal-clear in rich sea-blue and turquoise gradients, with beautiful caustics and clean sparkling reflections.

Wardrobe: A fitted charcoal drift suit with magenta seam-piping, articulated shoulders, padded knees, high collar — full-coverage, modest, motorsport-coded.

Footwear: Thin-soled charcoal driving shoes with magenta heel flash, ankle-snug, built for clutch-and-brake feel.

Eye Colour: Warm amber-brown (consistent locked identity), catching magenta neon and fluorescent flicker, fixed on the line.

Accessories: Fingerless carbon gloves, a slim charcoal open-face helmet with clear visor (worn from Frame 2), thin titanium wrist cuff, a quick-release harness.

Hair: The same tight low braid, tail flicking with each transition, edges sealed.

Makeup: Matte complexion catching cool light, defined brow, smoky neutral eye, neutral lip; faint sweat-sheen permitted.

Movement (the one impossible move): At the peak of a tandem drift, the billowing tire smoke does not dissipate — it glows from within, ignites with colour, and reforms into a vast phoenix that sweeps along the cars, then scatters into embers as they straighten.

Concept Line: "She writes her line in smoke — and it takes wing."

Duration: ~21 seconds · 7 frames · 24fps · 180° shutter.

Mood: Sleek, kinetic, smoky, defiant.

Composition: Hard verticals of pillars and ramps, neon leading-lines, reflective wet-floor foregrounds, cars raked across thirds; intercut low chase plates, a door-to-door two-shot, and a hero skid-stop. Premium foreground, midground and background layering with strong three-dimensional depth and clean visual balance (original framing preserved).

Grade: Deep teal-black garage, magenta and amber accents, cold fluorescent green-white, wet speculars, rich blacks, controlled bloom on smoke and lights. World-class editorial colour — rich and vivid yet clean, luminous mid-tones, deep-but-clean blacks, controlled saturation, nothing washed-out, natural skin protected.

Identity Safety: Aira rendered entirely from the locked reference sheet; adult, 25; no physical or ethnic enumeration; full-coverage wardrobe; stylized stunt, damage on cars and structure only.

### 🎚️ Master Soundtrack & Sound-Design Brief — Audio Block B (outside the prompts)

Role: The continuous score and sound-design bed under the in-frame diegetic audio across all seven frames, binding them into one twenty-one-second piece. Genre & palette: Cyber-funk drift anthem — slapped synth-bass, gated trap-influenced drums, a vocoder stab, an arpeggiated lead, and a soaring choral-synth reserved for the phoenix. Tempo & key: 128 BPM, G minor, 4/4, locked so transitions and impacts land on the downbeat. Instrumentation by layer: sub and slap-bass (engine torque), 16th-note arp (momentum), gated snare and rimshots (drive), shimmering choral pad and bright bells (the phoenix magic), granular rain-and-concrete texture (atmosphere). Dynamic arc: Frame 1 sparse and wet (arp and rain only); Frames 2–3 full kit and bass enter with the launch and tandem; Frame 4 tension stab on the door-to-door; Frame 5 a riser into the transition; Frame 6 the phoenix choral lead blooms in full; Frame 7 a triumphant final hit tailing back to the opening arp for a perfect loop. Hits & transitions: sub-drop on the clutch-kick initiation (F2), a stab on the rival's lunge (F4), a reverse-cymbal riser into the smoke-phoenix reveal (F6), a gated-snare crash on the hero stop (F7). Mix: score about 6 dB under engine and tire-squeal; sidechain the bed to the biggest revs; wide-stereo arps and pads, mono-tight sub; tape saturation, plate reverb on the choral lead, concrete-canyon slap-delay. Loop point: the closing arp matches bar one.

MASTER AUDIO: a 42-second custom cinematic score (7 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on deep trailer percussion, a driving synth bass and brass swells — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a low brass-and-sub impact (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 5, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — At the peak of a tandem drift, the billowing tire smoke does not dissipate, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, taut percussive tension as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

### Frame 1 of 7 — IMAGE PROMPT
STRICT COLOUR & RENDER MANDATE (must be followed exactly; this governs render QUALITY only and must NOT change the composition, camera, lens, framing, wardrobe, action or identity specified above): render the colours already specified at their richest, freshest, cleanest and most premium — crisp, vivid and luminous with elegant, controlled saturation; never dull, faded, washed-out, muddy, grey or flat. Hold deep-but-clean blacks, luminous full mid-tones and beautiful highlight roll-off with high dynamic range and no blown highlights. Wherever sky is visible, render it richly graded and cinematic — never empty, white or overexposed. Wherever water is visible, render it crystal-clear with deep sea-blue and turquoise gradients, clean caustics and sparkling reflections — never grey or murky (unless the concept explicitly specifies dark / ink / obsidian water, which stays deep, glassy and clean). Protect natural, true skin tone; never push saturation onto the face. Keep the image immaculately clean and premium with clear figure-to-ground separation so the hero reads first; honour the concept's intended dominant surface and full-frame coverage, and do NOT reveal unwanted structural edges, seams, side-walls or empty dead space that break the intended composition. Photoreal, award-winning editorial finish — no AI artifacts, plastic or waxy skin, dead eyes, malformed hands or unfinished backgrounds.

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here]. Scene: she stands beside the idling drift coupe on a flooded garage deck, one gloved hand on the door, helmet under the other arm, reading the rival car staged a few lengths ahead through the rain. WARDROBE: charcoal drift suit with magenta piping, collar up, zipped to the sternum, beaded with fine rain. FOOTWEAR: charcoal driving shoes with magenta heel flash, planted shoulder-width on the wet deck. EYE COLOUR: warm amber-brown, magenta neon catchlight, gaze on the rival. MAKEUP: matte cool-lit skin, defined brow, smoky neutral eye, neutral lip. HANDS & NAILS: short clean nails, gloved fingers resting on the door sill. EXPRESSION: cold-focus game face — steady level gaze at the rival, lips in a strong neutral set, a slow controlled exhale, calm intensity, the faintest jaw-tension. BODY POSTURE & WEIGHT: weight on the back foot, hips squared to the car, shoulders settled, living stillness — breath and rain-drip alive. SPATIAL LOGIC: foreground wet-floor reflection and the front wheel; midground Aira and the open door; background the staged rival car, pillars and the glowing city beyond the open edge. LIGHTING: KEY magenta neon camera-left; FILL cold fluorescent bounce off wet concrete; RIM cool edge on braid and shoulder; PRACTICAL car rim-lights and tube flicker. FRAMING: ASPECT 9:16, medium-wide, low camera, deck line on the lower third, pillars rising. SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: Framed as medium-wide, low camera, deck line on the lower third, pillars rising, on a low hero angle looking up. Most of the figure is in frame with the environment around her. Her body is hips squared and weight grounded, in dynamically angled to camera. Camera distance follows the shot size, holding the action sharp. The beat: she stands beside the idling drift coupe on a flooded garage deck, one gloved hand on the door, helmet under the other arm, reading the rival car staged a few lengths ahead through the rain. Her pose reads as weight on the back foot, hips squared to the car, shoulders settled, living stillness — breath and rain-drip alive — gaze fierce and narrowed through the slide, reading the exit; head braced and steady against the lateral G; both shoulders driving the counter-steer; the RIGHT arm cranking full opposite-lock with forearm cords standing out while the LEFT arm braces the wheel; torso thrown against the lateral G, braced and coiled; waist torqued, hips wedged into the seat; the RIGHT leg feeding throttle mid-slide while the LEFT boot stays hard on the floor; both feet committed, weight slung outward against the slide; braid flung across the shoulder by the lateral throw. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame. LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm-equivalent, f/2.8, sharp on her, background melting to neon bokeh. ATMOSPHERE: drifting rain through open sides, faint exhaust haze, wet reflections. COLOR GRADE: teal-black garage, magenta-amber accents, cold fluorescent, wet speculars, controlled bloom. TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: pores and rain-beads, brushed suit fabric, oil-rainbow floor, pristine fairing. NEGATIVE: no extra people, no facial blur, no distorted hands, no logos or text, no melted car geometry, no oversaturation, no sexualization, no physical or ethnic enumeration, no watermark.

The beat: the hero stop — the coupe slides to a triumphant halt across the garage's open edge against the city skyline, Aira risen from the cockpit, the last smoke-phoenix embers scattering around her, the rival easing to a stop respectfully behind. Her pose reads as tall and open, weight grounded, shoulders dropping back, a victor's stillness — gaze fierce and narrowed through the slide, reading the exit; head braced and steady against the lateral G; both shoulders driving the counter-steer; the RIGHT arm cranking full opposite-lock with forearm cords standing out while the LEFT arm braces the wheel; torso thrown against the lateral G, braced and coiled; waist torqued, hips wedged into the seat; the RIGHT leg feeding throttle mid-slide while the LEFT boot stays hard on the floor; both feet committed, weight slung outward against the slide; braid flung across the shoulder by the lateral throw. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame. LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm-equivalent, f/4, embers in soft bokeh, sharp on her. ATMOSPHERE: drifting embers, settling smoke and rain-mist, neon serenity. COLOR GRADE: magenta-amber over teal-black, wet speculars, gentle bloom, clean blacks. TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: skin and sweat, smoke on the suit, fading ember filaments, the coupe's accumulated battle scars (scraped lip, rubbed door, cracked corner light) all visible. NEGATIVE: no extra people beyond the distant rival, no warped face, no logos, no oversaturation, no sexualization, no enumeration, no text.

### Frame 7 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT
STRICT COLOUR & RENDER MANDATE (must be followed exactly; this governs render QUALITY only and must NOT change the composition, camera, lens, framing, wardrobe, action or identity specified above): render the colours already specified at their richest, freshest, cleanest and most premium — crisp, vivid and luminous with elegant, controlled saturation; never dull, faded, washed-out, muddy, grey or flat. Hold deep-but-clean blacks, luminous full mid-tones and beautiful highlight roll-off with high dynamic range and no blown highlights. Wherever sky is visible, render it richly graded and cinematic — never empty, white or overexposed. Wherever water is visible, render it crystal-clear with deep sea-blue and turquoise gradients, clean caustics and sparkling reflections — never grey or murky (unless the concept explicitly specifies dark / ink / obsidian water, which stays deep, glassy and clean). Protect natural, true skin tone; never push saturation onto the face. Keep the image immaculately clean and premium with clear figure-to-ground separation so the hero reads first; honour the concept's intended dominant surface and full-frame coverage, and do NOT reveal unwanted structural edges, seams, side-walls or empty dead space that break the intended composition. Photoreal, award-winning editorial finish — no AI artifacts, plastic or waxy skin, dead eyes, malformed hands or unfinished backgrounds.

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: Heroic low-angle finale shot. CAMERA MOVEMENT: one move only — a slow push-in and slight rise settling on Aira standing. LENS: 35mm-equivalent, f/4. PHYSICS: the coupe scrubs the last speed in a controlled skid and settles on its suspension with a final weight-rock; Aira rises against residual momentum; the phoenix loses cohesion and sheds embers that fall and fade with gentle buoyancy; smoke and rain-mist settle. SUBJECT + OBJECT ACTION (timecoded): 0.0–2.0s the coupe slides to a stop at the open edge, suspension rocking and settling (smoke drifting forward); 2.0–4.0s Aira pushes up to stand, lifts the visor, braid loosening (rival easing to a halt behind); 4.0–6.0s she exhales and a brief fierce smile breaks as the last embers scatter and wink out around her. EXPRESSION TRANSITION: into into — hard focus melts to a heaving-chest release at 2.8s, resolving into eased-brow triumph and a brief fierce smile by 5.2s. LIGHTING: city glow, magenta neon, ember practicals. ENVIRONMENT: garage open edge, glowing skyline, settling smoke. AUDIO (Block A): the engine spooling down to an idle then off, a tick of cooling metal, rain patter, a long exhale at 2.8s, a final warm crackle as embers fade; score lands a gated-snare crash then tails to the opening arp for the loop. DURATION: 6.0s. FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, 180°, gentle blur on the rise, crisp on the face. LIP-SYNC: none; an exhale and a closed-lip smile. NEGATIVE: no cut, no second move, no extra people up close, no warped geometry, no text or watermark.

## Concept 04 — Night Rally Forest Stage

Lane: Rally · single car, night forest special stage.

Format: Eight-frame vertical action reel — one continuous flat-out night rally stage through dense pine forest rendered as eight seeded keyframes, roughly twenty-four seconds.

Hero Vehicle: A compact all-wheel-drive rally car in electric-blue over matte-white, roof-mounted light pod, mud flaps, exposed sump guard, big rear wing; progressive realistic damage — mud-caked flanks, a cracked light lens, a dented fender, pine-needle litter — never wrecked, always charging.

Setting: A dense pine forest at night, narrow muddy stage road, ground fog pooling, towering black trunks, spectators' distant flares far off, a star-pricked sky in the gaps, deep ruts and a big crest jump. Each area of the frame intentionally composed, pristine and luxurious, with true foreground-to-background layering and immersive environmental depth. Sky richly graded and cinematic with elegant clouds and premium light, never flat or empty. Greenery lush and healthy with premium landscaping.

Wardrobe: A fitted electric-blue-and-white rally suit with reflective piping, articulated shoulders, padded knees, high collar — full-coverage, modest, motorsport-coded.

Footwear: Charcoal rally boots with blue laces, reinforced ankle, thin soles for pedal feel, mud-flecked.

Eye Colour: Warm amber-brown (consistent locked identity), lit by the light pod's cold beams, fixed down the stage.

Accessories: A white full-face rally helmet with intercom, HANS-style collar, fireproof gloves, the thin titanium wrist cuff (worn from Frame 1, helmet from Frame 2).

Hair: The same tight low braid, tucked into the collar, tail flicking free.

Makeup: Matte complexion catching cold beam-light, defined brow, neutral eye, neutral lip; sweat and mud-fleck permitted.

Movement (the one impossible move): As the car blasts through a deep puddle and throws a towering rooster-tail, the spray bursts into clouds of bioluminescent spores that glow electric-blue and green, hanging in the fog like a galaxy, then drift down as light.

Concept Line: "She runs the dark stage — and the forest lights up to watch."

Duration: ~24 seconds · 8 frames · 24fps · 180° shutter.

Mood: Wild, organic, headlong, luminous.

Composition: Tall trunk verticals, beam leading-lines through fog, muddy-rut foregrounds, the car raked across thirds; intercut low chase plates, an over-crest jump angle, a near-miss tree-pass, and a hero stop. Rich layered foreground-to-background depth, elegant spatial hierarchy and clean visual flow (original framing and angle preserved).

Grade: Deep forest blue-black, cold light-pod white-blue, warm flare accents, bioluminescent blue-green for the magic, rich blacks, controlled bloom in the fog. Premium editorial grade — rich clean colour, luminous mid-tones, deep-but-clean blacks, controlled elegant saturation, no faded or muddy tones, natural true skin preserved.

Identity Safety: Aira rendered entirely from the locked reference sheet; adult, 25; no physical or ethnic enumeration; full-coverage wardrobe; stylized stunt, damage on the car and environment only.

### 🎚️ Master Soundtrack & Sound-Design Brief — Audio Block B (outside the prompts)

Role: The continuous score and sound-design bed under the in-frame diegetic audio across all eight frames, binding them into one twenty-four-second piece. Genre & palette: Organic-electronic hybrid — pulsing synth bass, live taiko and frame-drum, a forest field-recording bed, a tense string ostinato, and a shimmering choir-and-bell motif reserved for the spore magic. Tempo & key: 132 BPM, E minor, 4/4, locked so jumps and impacts land on the downbeat. Instrumentation by layer: sub and synth bass (engine power), driving taiko and toms (forward charge), string ostinato (tension), shimmering choir and glass bells (the bioluminescent magic), granular fog-and-forest texture (atmosphere). Dynamic arc: Frames 1–2 sparse and tense (ostinato and forest only); Frames 3–5 full drums and bass enter with the charge and jump; Frame 6 the spore-magic choir blooms over a riser; Frame 7 a half-time breakdown for the near-miss; Frame 8 full triumphant tutti tailing to the opening ostinato for a perfect loop. Hits & transitions: sub-drop on the launch (F2), a taiko-roll riser into the crest jump (F5), a beat-dropout and 250ms suspended silence at the jump apex (F5→F6), an impact boom and brief near-silence on the tree near-miss (F7), a taiko-and-choir stinger on the hero stop (F8). Mix: score about 6 dB under engine and gravel-impacts; sidechain the bed to the biggest revs; wide-stereo strings and choir, mono-tight sub; tape saturation, forest reverb on the choir, slap-back on the intercom crackle. Loop point: the closing ostinato matches bar one.

MASTER AUDIO: a 48-second custom cinematic score (8 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on deep trailer percussion, a driving synth bass and brass swells — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a low brass-and-sub impact (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 5, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — As the car blasts through a deep puddle and throws a towering rooster-tail, the spray bursts…, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, taut percussive tension as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. SUBJECT + OBJECT ACTION (timecoded): 0.0–2.0s the car lands and punches the puddle, a towering rooster-tail bursting up (spray atomizing); 2.0–4.0s the spray ignites into glowing blue-green spores that hang like a galaxy around the car, motes drifting; 4.0–6.0s the car powers forward through the luminous cloud, spores trailing in its wake. EXPRESSION TRANSITION: into into — strained effort releases into parted-lip awe at 2.4s as the spores ignite, blooming into a wild grin by 4.8s. LIGHTING: self-luminous spore-light on her face, glowing rim. ENVIRONMENT: forest stage transformed into a galaxy of living light. AUDIO (Block A): engine easing to a confident note, a deep water-blast as the puddle erupts, a shimmering crystalline chime as the spores ignite at 2.0s, a soft delighted exhale-laugh at 4.8s; the choir-and-bell spore lead blooms over a riser. DURATION: 6.0s. FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, 180°, silky blur on the rise, crisp spores. LIP-SYNC: none; a breath of wonder. NEGATIVE: no cut, no second move, no cartoonish glitter, no warped car, no text.

## Concept 05 — Glacier Snowmobile Battle

Lane: Snow vehicle · snowmobile duel across a living glacier.

Format: Eight-frame vertical action reel — one continuous high-speed snowmobile battle over blue glacier ice under the aurora rendered as eight seeded keyframes, roughly twenty-four seconds.

Hero Vehicle: A race-spec snowmobile in arctic-white over cyan, long track, studded paddles, low windscreen, exposed suspension; progressive realistic damage — ice-scoured skis, a cracked cowl, frost-caked tunnel — never wrecked, always flying.

Rival Vehicle: A charcoal snowmobile with orange accents, harrying her across the ice; takes its own scars and never crashes.

Setting: A vast blue glacier at night, mirror-smooth ice fields, yawning crevasses, sculpted ice ridges and a cathedral-like ice cave, an immense green-and-violet aurora rippling overhead and reflecting in the ice. Each area of the frame intentionally composed, pristine and luxurious, with true foreground-to-background layering and immersive environmental depth. Sky richly graded and cinematic with elegant clouds and premium light, never flat or empty. Architecture in fine premium materials with an immaculate finish.

Wardrobe: A fitted insulated snow-race suit in arctic-white with cyan piping, articulated padding, high storm-collar — full-coverage, modest, expedition-coded.

Footwear: Insulated white snow-race boots with cyan buckles, reinforced shin, aggressive grip soles.

Eye Colour: Warm amber-brown (consistent locked identity), catching aurora-green glints, fixed across the ice.

Accessories: A white full-face snow helmet with a gold-tint goggle visor (worn from Frame 2), insulated gauntlet gloves, a thin titanium wrist cuff, a slim avalanche pack.

Hair: The same tight low braid, tucked into the storm-collar, tail flicking free.

Makeup: Matte cold-flushed complexion, defined brow, cool eye, neutral lip; frost-breath and sweat-sheen permitted.

Movement (the one impossible move): As the sled carves hard and throws a great fan of snow, the spray does not fall — it freezes mid-air into suspended aurora-lit crystals that hang glittering green and violet, then chime down as light.

Concept Line: "She carves the glacier — and the night sky answers in crystal."

Duration: ~24 seconds · 8 frames · 24fps · 180° shutter.

Mood: Frozen, fierce, vast, luminous.

Composition: Wide ice horizons, aurora leading-lines, crevasse foregrounds, the sled raked across thirds; intercut low chase plates, a crevasse-jump angle, an ice-cave pass, and a hero stop. Rich layered foreground-to-background depth, elegant spatial hierarchy and clean visual flow (original framing and angle preserved).

Grade: Glacial blue-black, aurora green-violet, cold cyan highlights, warm helmet practicals, rich blacks, controlled bloom on snow and sky. Premium editorial grade — rich clean colour, luminous mid-tones, deep-but-clean blacks, controlled elegant saturation, no faded or muddy tones, natural true skin preserved.

Identity Safety: Aira rendered entirely from the locked reference sheet; adult, 25; no physical or ethnic enumeration; full-coverage wardrobe; stylized stunt, damage on the sleds and ice only.

### 🎚️ Master Soundtrack & Sound-Design Brief — Audio Block B (outside the prompts)

Role: The continuous score and sound-design bed under the in-frame diegetic audio across all eight frames, binding them into one twenty-four-second piece. Genre & palette: Glacial cinematic-electronic — deep sub-bass, gated arctic percussion, a crystalline glass-mallet motif, a soaring choir reserved for the aurora-crystal magic, and wind-and-ice ambience. Tempo & key: 126 BPM, C minor, 4/4, locked so jumps and impacts land on the downbeat. Instrumentation by layer: sub and synth bass (sled power), gated toms and taiko (forward charge), tense string tremolo (threat), shimmering glass mallets and choir (the crystal magic), granular wind-and-ice texture (atmosphere). Dynamic arc: Frames 1–2 sparse and frozen (wind and sub only); Frames 3–5 full percussion and bass enter with the chase and jump; Frame 6 the crystal-choir blooms over a riser; Frame 7 a half-time breakdown for the crevasse near-miss; Frame 8 full triumphant tutti tailing to the opening wind for a perfect loop. Hits & transitions: sub-drop on the launch (F2), a taiko-roll riser into the crevasse jump (F5), a beat-dropout and 250ms suspended silence at the jump apex (F5→F6), an impact boom and brief near-silence at the crevasse-edge near-miss (F7), a choir-and-taiko stinger on the hero stop (F8). Mix: score about 6 dB under engine and snow-impacts; sidechain the bed to the biggest revs; wide-stereo choir and pads, mono-tight sub; tape saturation, cathedral reverb on the choir in the ice cave. Loop point: the closing wind matches bar one.

MASTER AUDIO: a 48-second custom cinematic score (8 clips × 6s) composed in self-resolving ~6-second phrases, so it can be trimmed to the reel’s assembled length at any phrase boundary without a hard cut — it always resolves, never stops dead or loops audibly. Built on deep trailer percussion, a driving synth bass and brass swells — premium, cinematic and emotionally catching, never generic stock or empty ambience. It opens immediately on a low brass-and-sub impact (no fade-in) so the mood lands within the first second. Emotional arc: an airy intimate open across the first beats, a rising shimmer of anticipation toward frame 5, the warm emotional peak on the signature move — As the sled carves hard and throws a great fan of snow, the spray does not…, then a graceful resolve back toward the opening for an invisible loop. SPOKEN reel — the score opens space for the spoken line at its beat and ducks gently beneath the voice, then re-blooms after. Layered as one system — lead melody, warm sub for body, taut percussive tension as atmosphere, restrained percussion, and event impacts reserved for the major beats, each tuned to the score’s own key so every hit reads as the music itself expanding, never an added sound effect.

### Frame 1 of 8 — IMAGE PROMPT
STRICT COLOUR & RENDER MANDATE (must be followed exactly; this governs render QUALITY only and must NOT change the composition, camera, lens, framing, wardrobe, action or identity specified above): render the colours already specified at their richest, freshest, cleanest and most premium — crisp, vivid and luminous with elegant, controlled saturation; never dull, faded, washed-out, muddy, grey or flat. Her pose reads as tall and open, weight grounded, shoulders dropping back, a victor's stillness — gaze sweeping the swells with steady nerve; head squared into the gale; both shoulders square to the threat and braced; the RIGHT hand gripping the tiller or rail with knuckles set while the LEFT arm reaches out for balance; torso braced wide and low against the pitch, core centred; waist low, hips squared over the deck; the RIGHT leg and LEFT leg braced wide on the pitching wet deck with knees soft; both grip-soled feet planted and weighted low, riding the heave; soaked braid whipping in the gale. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame. LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm-equivalent, f/4, crystals in soft bokeh, sharp on her. ATMOSPHERE: drifting chiming crystals, settling spindrift, glacial serenity. COLOR GRADE: rich aurora green-violet, deep glacial-blue shadow, gentle bloom, clean blacks. TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: skin and frost-breath, frost on the suit, fading crystal-motes, the sled's accumulated battle scars (scoured skis, cracked cowl, frost-caked tunnel) all visible. NEGATIVE: no extra people, no warped face, no logos, no oversaturation, no sexualization, no enumeration, no text.

### Frame 8 of 8 — VIDEO PROMPT
STRICT COLOUR & RENDER MANDATE (must be followed exactly; this governs render QUALITY only and must NOT change the composition, camera, lens, framing, wardrobe, action or identity specified above): render the colours already specified at their richest, freshest, cleanest and most premium — crisp, vivid and luminous with elegant, controlled saturation; never dull, faded, washed-out, muddy, grey or flat.
